content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

Found a correctness gap: the only committed changes are run-state artifacts, and they capture a final-review reviewer default that contradicts the requested cross-model defaults (Codex + Opus). No source-level update to backend-default logic is present in this diff.

## Amendments

1. The diff only updates runtime state files and does not modify the backend-default source paths. In the new `final_review` snapshot, the reviewer pair is now stored as `codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh` plus `codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh` (`.ralph-burning/projects/utm/run.json:19-27`), while the journal shows the same active `reviewer_started` models (`.ralph-burning/projects/utm/journal.ndjson:25-26`). This violates the bead requirement for default final reviewers to be Codex gpt-5.4 xhigh and Opus 4.6, so the requested default change is not actually reflected in the tracked deliverable.
   Rationale: Acceptance criteria explicitly require cross-model defaults; this patch currently records a single-family duplicate reviewer default in persisted run metadata with no corresponding source change to enforce the Opus default.
